      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "PART 3 — Country Analysis\n",
        "\n",
        "Q5. Total Medal Count\n",
        "\n",
        "Find total medals won by each country.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Display top 10 countries.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "j8Jh2MSuFPER"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "total_medals_per_country = medal_winners['NOC'].value_counts().reset_index()\n",
        "total_medals_per_country.columns = ['Country', 'Total Medals']\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Top 10 Countries by Total Medal Count:\")\n",
        "display(total_medals_per_country.head(10))"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q6. Visualize Top 10 Countries\n",
        "\n",
        "Create a bar chart of top 10 countries by total medals.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "vTtYqjbAF3iB"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))\n",
        "sns.barplot(x='Country', y='Total Medals', data=total_medals_per_country.head(10), palette='viridis')\n",
        "plt.title('Top 10 Countries by Total Medal Count')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Country')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Total Medals')\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 360
        },
        "id": "T4ISoUs7GQzJ",

      },

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q7. Gold Medal Analysis\n",
        "Filter only Gold medals.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Find top 10 countries with most Gold medals.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Plot a bar chart.\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "rnnBZ1kpGpQA"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "gold_medal_winners = medal_winners[medal_winners['Medal'] == 'Gold']\n",
        "\n",
        "top_10_gold_medals = gold_medal_winners['NOC'].value_counts().reset_index()\n",
        "top_10_gold_medals.columns = ['Country', 'Gold Medals']\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Top 10 Countries with Most Gold Medals:\")\n",
        "display(top_10_gold_medals.head(10))"
      ],

      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "PART 4 — Gender Analysis\n",
        "\n",
        "Q8. Gender Distribution\n",
        "Find total medals won by Male and Female athletes.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Visualize using countplot or bar chart.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "6_qzGMBxHDZ4"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "gender_medal_counts = medal_winners['Sex'].value_counts().reset_index()\n",
        "gender_medal_counts.columns = ['Gender', 'Total Medals']\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Total Medals won by Male and Female athletes:\")\n",
        "display(gender_medal_counts)"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q9. Gender Trend Over Years\n",
        "Group data by Year and Sex.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Plot medal trend over years for Male and Female athletes.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "vcgaXUS5IGMB"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "gender_year_trend = medal_winners.groupby(['Year', 'Sex']).size().reset_index(name='Medal Count')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(14, 7))\n",
        "sns.lineplot(data=gender_year_trend, x='Year', y='Medal Count', hue='Sex', marker='o')\n",
        "plt.title('Medal Trend Over Years by Gender')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Year')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Number of Medals')\n",
        "plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "PART 5 — Sport Analysis\n",
        "\n",
        "Q10. Top Sports\n",
        "Find top 10 sports by total medals.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Plot a bar chart.\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "-ULEc2HG_f5d"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "top_sports = medal_winners['Sport'].value_counts().reset_index()\n",
        "top_sports.columns = ['Sport', 'Total Medals']\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Top 10 Sports by Total Medal Count:\")\n",
        "display(top_sports.head(10))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))\n",
        "sns.barplot(x='Sport', y='Total Medals', data=top_sports.head(10), palette='magma')\n",
        "plt.title('Top 10 Sports by Total Medal Count')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Sport')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Total Medals')\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q11. Gold Medal Sport\n",
        "Which sport gives the highest number of Gold medals?\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "qQqdzQPYAlSq"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "gold_medal_sports = medal_winners[medal_winners['Medal'] == 'Gold']\n",
        "top_gold_medal_sport = gold_medal_sports['Sport'].value_counts().idxmax()\n",
        "top_gold_medal_sport_count = gold_medal_sports['Sport'].value_counts().max()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"The sport with the highest number of Gold medals is '{top_gold_medal_sport}' with {top_gold_medal_sport_count} Gold medals.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "kRW-TJbXApzd",
        "outputId": "0ee3c101-3838-466d-e6cf-5afc46fd4bb4"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "The sport with the highest number of Gold medals is 'Athletics' with 1230 Gold medals.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        " PART 6 — Year-wise Analysis\n",
        "\n",
        "Q12. Medal Trend Over Time\n",
        "Find total medals per year.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Plot a line graph.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Za_kNulmBBVU"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "medals_per_year = medal_winners.groupby('Year').size().reset_index(name='Total Medals')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(15, 7))\n",
        "sns.lineplot(x='Year', y='Total Medals', data=medals_per_year, marker='o')\n",
        "plt.title('Total Medals Awarded Over the Years')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Year')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Total Medals')\n",
        "plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 238
        },
        "id": "gogJWPveBDh6",
        "outputId": "c0b8a4c6-225f-4590-9851-d104d74a6dab"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q13. Best Olympic Year\n",
        "Which year had the highest number of medals awarded?\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "cHk8mtfyBL14"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "best_olympic_year = medals_per_year.loc[medals_per_year['Total Medals'].idxmax()]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"The year with the highest number of medals awarded was {int(best_olympic_year['Year'])} with {best_olympic_year['Total Medals']} medals.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "lh6fhWImBRHQ",
        "outputId": "d0a609aa-b3e9-4fd5-8651-5d253f53185f"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "The year with the highest number of medals awarded was 1992 with 1831.0 medals.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        " PART 7 — Age Analysis\n",
        "\n",
        "Q14. Age Distribution\n",
        "Plot histogram of age of medal winners.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "What is the most common winning age range?\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "k4w4uFm2BcBo"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))\n",
        "sns.histplot(medal_winners['Age'].dropna(), bins=30, kde=True, color='skyblue')\n",
        "plt.title('Age Distribution of Olympic Medal Winners')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Age')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Number of Medal Winners')\n",
        "plt.grid(axis='y', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 253
        },
        "id": "UJxHG4pjBoDJ",
        "outputId": "64343a86-dcfa-4a57-9fc6-6ccc36fb9460"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1200x600 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q15. Average Age by Medal Type\n",
        "Find average age for Gold, Silver, and Bronze medal winners.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "eGIOFdhKBxLm"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "average_age_by_medal = medal_winners.groupby('Medal')['Age'].mean().reset_index()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Average Age of Medal Winners by Medal Type:\")\n",
        "display(average_age_by_medal)"

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "PART 8 — Correlation & Numerical Insight\n",
        "\n",
        "Q16. Correlation Matrix\n",
        "Create correlation heatmap for numerical columns (Age, Height, Weight).\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Which two variables are most correlated?\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "8BrzVg-UB8my"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "numerical_columns_for_corr = medal_winners[['Age', 'Height', 'Weight']].dropna()\n",
        "correlation_matrix = numerical_columns_for_corr.corr()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(correlation_matrix, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt=\".2f\")\n",
        "plt.title('Correlation Heatmap of Age, Height, and Weight for Medal Winners')\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 415
        },
        "id": "v5wHinGUCLNz",
        "outputId": "987905ec-b034-4e79-c9a7-6e5b35696234"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x600 with 2 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        " PART 9 — Mini Investigation (Open-Ended)\n",
        "\n",
        "Q17. Country Performance\n",
        "Choose one country:\n",
        "Total medals\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Gold medals\n",
        "\n",
        "Best sport\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Medal trend over years\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "Present your findings.\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "j0PDKHGYCr38"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "92f3f048",
        "outputId": "da5f9dde-e024-4fbd-c516-1d1aedd33601"
      },
      "source": [
        "chosen_country = 'USA'\n",
        "\n",
        "country_medal_winners = medal_winners[medal_winners['NOC'] == chosen_country]\n",
        "\n",
        "country_total_medals = len(country_medal_winners)\n",
        "country_gold_medals = len(country_medal_winners[country_medal_winners['Medal'] == 'Gold'])\n",
        "\n",
        "best_sport_for_country = country_medal_winners['Sport'].value_counts().idxmax()\n",
        "best_sport_medals = country_medal_winners['Sport'].value_counts().max()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"--- {chosen_country} Performance ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Medals: {country_total_medals}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Gold Medals: {country_gold_medals}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Best Sport: {best_sport_for_country} with {best_sport_medals} medals\")"
      ],
      "execution_count": 29,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "--- USA Performance ---\n",
            "Total Medals: 5161\n",
            "Gold Medals: 2400\n",
            "Best Sport: Athletics with 1006 medals\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 205
        },
        "id": "08d14cfe",
        "outputId": "6aaf8035-6aa8-4ab6-b213-e7ac364dee8d"
      },
      "source": [
        "country_medals_per_year = country_medal_winners.groupby('Year').size().reset_index(name='Total Medals')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(15, 7))\n",
        "sns.lineplot(x='Year', y='Total Medals', data=country_medals_per_year, marker='o')\n",
        "plt.title(f'Medal Trend Over the Years for {chosen_country}')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Year')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Total Medals')\n",
        "plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "execution_count": 30,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q18. Sport Deep Dive\n",
        "Choose one sport:\n",
        "● Which country dominates?\n",
        "● Gender participation trend\n",
        "● Average age of winners"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "8tFYrZL9M-zn"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "480a0394",
        "outputId": "9ab638c8-5ac4-4f76-ac59-4581eb6435be"
      },
      "source": [
        "chosen_sport = 'Athletics'\n",
        "\n",
        "sport_medal_winners = medal_winners[medal_winners['Sport'] == chosen_sport]\n",
        "dominant_country_in_sport = sport_medal_winners['NOC'].value_counts().idxmax()\n",
        "dominant_country_medals = sport_medal_winners['NOC'].value_counts().max()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"--- {chosen_sport} Deep Dive ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Dominant Country: {dominant_country_in_sport} with {dominant_country_medals} medals\")"
      ],
      "execution_count": 38,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "--- Athletics Deep Dive ---\n",
            "Dominant Country: USA with 1006 medals\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 219
        },
        "id": "ed3a8e61",
        "outputId": "8651ae84-a943-4c0d-e35d-65d6298856ec"
      },
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "sport_gender_trend = sport_medal_winners.groupby(['Year', 'Sex']).size().reset_index(name='Medal Count')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(14, 7))\n",
        "sns.lineplot(data=sport_gender_trend, x='Year', y='Medal Count', hue='Sex', marker='o')\n",
        "plt.title(f'Medal Trend Over Years by Gender in {chosen_sport}')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Year')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Number of Medals')\n",
        "plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "execution_count": 37,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1400x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 297
        },
        "id": "0d9b7210",
        "outputId": "3a6caeda-b349-4af3-b353-7eafa4e175e2"
      },
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "average_age_sport = sport_medal_winners['Age'].mean()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"Average Age of Medal Winners in {chosen_sport}: {average_age_sport:.2f} years\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "sns.histplot(sport_medal_winners['Age'].dropna(), bins=20, kde=True, color='purple')\n",
        "plt.title(f'Age Distribution of Medal Winners in {chosen_sport}')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Age')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Number of Medal Winners')\n",
        "plt.grid(axis='y', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "execution_count": 36,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Average Age of Medal Winners in Athletics: 25.02 years\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1000x600 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },

      "source": [
        "Q19. Top 5 Youngest Gold Medalists\n",
        "● Find youngest 5 Gold medal winners."

      "metadata": {
        "id": "CqtQhjk9Nb0n"

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Q20. Medal Ratio\n",
        "For top 5 countries:\n",
        "● Calculate Gold / Total medal ratio."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "13vlkUDNN6S6"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 261
        },
        "id": "093050ba",
        "outputId": "e03314fa-d8a4-4cf2-e676-1574782f2975"
      },
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "top_5_countries_total_medals = total_medals_per_country.head(5)\n",
        "top_5_countries_gold_medals = top_10_gold_medals[top_10_gold_medals['Country'].isin(top_5_countries_total_medals['Country'])]\n",
        "medal_ratio_df = pd.merge(top_5_countries_total_medals, top_5_countries_gold_medals, on='Country', how='left')\n",
        "medal_ratio_df['Gold Medals'] = medal_ratio_df['Gold Medals'].fillna(0)\n",
        "medal_ratio_df['Gold_Total_Ratio'] = medal_ratio_df['Gold Medals'] / medal_ratio_df['Total Medals']\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Gold / Total Medal Ratio for Top 5 Countries:\")\n",
        "display(medal_ratio_df.sort_values(by='Gold_Total_Ratio', ascending=False))"
      ],
      "execution_count": 35,
